name: Google Keep
description: Note-taking service from Google for capturing text, lists, images, and audio across devices.

years.notes: Original Material Design launch icon used from March 20, 2013 through October 5, 2020. Yellow rounded-square with outlined lightbulb and dog-eared corner at the bottom-right. Redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.003639) over the native 6596x6592 source; decorative low-opacity overlays were dropped to keep the silhouette readable.

Workspace-era refresh introduced October 6, 2020. Filled white bulb on yellow body with dog-eared corner moved to the top-right. Native 64x88 source is non-square; redrawn to a 24x24 viewBox via translate(3.2727 0) scale(0.272727), centering horizontally so the full 88-unit height fits the icon canvas.

2026 Workspace refresh — Keep returns to a bulb silhouette: a yellow→orange radial-gradient circle body with a darker orange rounded base and a small white filament stroke at the centre, plus a soft pink inner-glow blur. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as SVG_STRING.
